introSection: DaVinci Ride is a steel winged roller coaster located at Fantasy Valley in Xiangzhou, Xiangyang, Hubei, China. Opened on 29 April 2022, it was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and is a custom Wing Coaster installation.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 32 riders per train.

fullText:
DaVinci Ride is a steel winged roller coaster located at Fantasy Valley in Xiangzhou, Xiangyang, Hubei, China. Opened on 29 April 2022, it was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and is a custom Wing Coaster installation.



2 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 32 riders per train.
